# Contract: Power Automate Dashboard Data API

**Flow**: Dashboard Data API (Flow #2)
**Trigger**: When an HTTP request is received
**Method**: GET

## Request

**URL**: `<auto-generated by Power Automate after saving>`
No request body. No query parameters for MVP.

## Response (200)

```json
{
  "leads": [
    {
      "id": 42,
      "name": "Jane Smith",
      "company": "Acme Industries",
      "email": "jane@acme-industries.com",
      "message": "We need pricing for warehouse automation...",
      "emailDomain": "acme-industries.com",
      "processingStatus": "Complete",
      "enrichmentCompany": "Acme Industries Inc.",
      "enrichmentIndustry": "Manufacturing",
      "enrichmentEmployees": "500-1000",
      "enrichmentLocation": "Sydney, Australia",
      "enrichmentStatus": "Complete",
      "aiCategory": "hot",
      "aiSummary": "Clear buying intent for warehouse automation with Q3 deadline.",
      "notificationStatus": "Sent",
      "errorFlag": false,
      "errorSummary": null,
      "stepHistory": [
        {"stage":"Received","timestamp":"2026-04-16T14:32:05Z","status":"success","detail":null},
        {"stage":"Enriched","timestamp":"2026-04-16T14:32:12Z","status":"success","detail":"Abstract API returned data"},
        {"stage":"AI Processed","timestamp":"2026-04-16T14:32:18Z","status":"success","detail":"Classified as hot"},
        {"stage":"Notified","timestamp":"2026-04-16T14:32:22Z","status":"success","detail":"Email sent"}
      ],
      "created": "2026-04-16T14:32:05Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Response Headers

| Header | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Content-Type | application/json |
| Access-Control-Allow-Origin | * |
